visual_description:
The audio is filled with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played by a string instrument, creates a pensive and slightly sorrowful atmosphere. The music is calm and reflective, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation or a serious, subdued moment. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the poignant melody to be the sole focus of the audio experience.

The scene focuses on a middle-aged man with short, graying hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt under a dark suit jacket. He is sitting in the back of a car, leaning his head back against the headrest with a relaxed or weary expression. The man is in the dimly lit interior of a car at night. The dark leather of the car seats is visible. Through the car's windows, the blurred lights of a city at night can be seen in the background. In the top left corner, there is a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera is positioned in a medium close-up, focusing on the man in the back seat. The shot is steady. The foreground is slightly out of focus, showing the shoulder of another person in the foreground.
